name: Zucchini-Omlett
recipeIngredient: 125 ml sunflower oil or corn oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stems and areas around them from the zucchini.
2. Wash the zucchini and cut them lengthwise into slices.
3. Heat oil in a pot and steam the vegetables until golden-yellow, turning them several times.
4. In a bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, oregano, and pepper.
5. Add a small amount of the oil used for steaming to a large pan and pour in the egg mixture.
6. Arrange the zucchini slices over the egg mass and gently stir them into the egg.
7. Allow the omelet to set slowly, then serve immediately alongside fresh flatbread.
